```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement database performance monitoring and alerting"
---
# Database Monitoring
## Task
Set up database performance monitoring.
## Requirements
1. Monitor query execution time (p50/p95/p99). 2. Track connection pool usage.
3. Monitor lock contention and deadlocks. 4. Alert on slow queries.
5. Track storage growth.
## Constraints
- Alert on p95 > 1s. Monitor connection exhaustion. Track storage growth rate.
## Success Criteria
- Query performance visible. Slow queries alerted. Pool and storage monitored.
```
